coveredRequirements: Individual slash commands registered, not single dispatcher (req 16)
/git-checkout without arguments shows interactive branch picker (req 5, 25)
/git-checkout on dirty tree prompts stash, auto-stash/unstash (req 18, 26)
/git-create-branch creates and checks out new branch (req 6)
/git-remote-main prompts to stash on dirty tree (req 26)
/git-remote-main when already on main skips checkout (req 32)
/git-commit stages all and commits with message (req 8, 21)
/git-commit with no changes notifies nothing to commit (req 33)
/git-pr creates PR via gh pr create against main (req 9, 20)
/git-pr detects existing PR and updates instead (req 9, 28)
/git-pr on main refuses with helpful message (req 34)
Stash pop conflict notifies error and leaves stash intact (req 36)
ambiguousRequirements: Req 22: Utility functions (trimOutput, shQuote, detectRepoRoot, ensureGhAuthenticated) are inlined — cannot test isolation without knowing export structure; tested indirectly via behavior
Req 24: 'runs from a pi session without dropping to shell' is architectural; tested indirectly by verifying commands use ctx.exec rather than child_process directly
Req 23: Exact diff truncation threshold is unspecified; test only asserts output is shorter than raw diff
notes: Tests use node:test and node:assert/strict matching local conventions exactly (see all existing examples)
Extension is imported from extensions/inline-git-commands.ts — the expected file path based on the plan
Two approaches for discovering commands: collectRegisteredCommands (pi.registerCommand pattern like worktree.ts) and findCommand (object-style export); tests try both
ctx mock provides exec with pattern-matching response map, ui.select/confirm/input/notify, and pi.notify/warn/error to cover both possible notification APIs
All tests are RED: they will fail until extensions/inline-git-commands.ts is implemented with the correct command registrations and behavior
